candidate_definition_hints.text: A commitizen adapter for the angular preset of https://github.com/conventional-changelog/conventional-changelog
Version 2.0.0 is compatible with lerna version 3 only, if you need support for lerna 2 (more specifically, lerna 2.0.0.beta.31).
